title: Stability measures for children looked after in England: 2024
body: "This statistical release provides information on the stability of children looked after on 31 March 2024 in:   their placement at school their professional support   The figures are based on data from the children looked after return (also known as SSDA903), which are collected from all local authorities and the school census. "

taxons.title: Looked-after children and children in care
